verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus has a table spread where the Saints of God are fed, He invites His chosen people "Come and dine;" With His Manna He doth feed and supplies our every need; O, 'tis sweet to sup with Jesus all the time!

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: "Come and dine," the Master calleth, "Come and dine," You may feast at Jesus' table all the time; He who fed the multitude, Turned the water into wine, To the hungry calleth now, "Come and dine."

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The disciples came to land, Thus obeying Christ's command, For the Master called to them, "Come and dine;" There they found their hearts' desire, Bread and fish upon the fire; Thus He satisfies the hungry every time.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Soon the Lamb will take His bride to be ever at His side, All the host of heaven will assembled be; O, 'twill be a glorious sight, All the Saints in spotless white; And with Jesus they will feast eternally.
